purpose: Analyze customer feedback and classify sentiment (positive/neutral/negative).
intended_use: Customer service analytics in retail/e-commerce; written feedback only.
dataset_description: Anonymized customer feedback from surveys and reviews; 10–200 words; PII removed.
limitations: May struggle with sarcasm/ambiguity; performance may drop on unseen languages/slang; weak on abusive language detection.
privacy_notes: No PII; no user identifiers stored; outputs don’t reveal identity.
